description: A PSYOP officer must plan a leaflet drop and radio broadcast campaign to encourage enemy soldiers to surrender.

nodes.task_description: Analyze intelligence on the morale and grievances of the target enemy soldiers.

expected_outcome.value: Officer identifies key themes (e.g., lack of food, poor leadership) that can be exploited.

nodes.task_description: Develop the content for the leaflets and radio broadcasts, including surrender instructions and promises of safe treatment.

expected_outcome.value: Officer creates persuasive and culturally appropriate messaging.

nodes.task_description: Plan the delivery of the messages, including coordinating for aircraft to drop the leaflets and a broadcast aircraft to transmit the radio messages.

expected_outcome.value: Officer creates a detailed execution plan for the PSYOP campaign.
